analysis.markdown:
The image displays a confusion matrix for a classification task involving three categories: Alzheimer, Frontotemporal, and Healthy. The matrix is represented as a heatmap with a color scale ranging from light blue (low values) to dark blue (high values).

| True \ Predicted | Alzheimer | Frontotemporal | Healthy |
| :--- | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| **Alzheimer** | 1693 | 4 | 179 |
| **Frontotemporal** | 1 | 1594 | 2 |
| **Healthy** | 712 | 2 | 392 |

The matrix shows high diagonal values, indicating strong classification performance for Alzheimer and Frontotemporal, while the Healthy category shows a significant number of misclassifications as Alzheimer (712).
